title: Skills
subtitle: Packages that extend the agent with specialized instructions and executable scripts. Upload a .zip file containing SKILL.md (with frontmatter) and a scripts/ folder.

internet.title: Network access
internet.none: No external access — internal backend only.
internet.hint: External domains the skill may connect to (added to the "internet" allowlist when enabled):

networks.title: Reserved networks
networks.hint: Grant this skill access to operator-provisioned corporate networks (LAN/VPN/subnets). The backend stays reachable regardless.

scope.notReadyTitle: The skill must be ready to be published

toggle.inChatHint: — the tools enter the chat context
toggle.viaAgentHint: — usable only by an agent that includes it (loadOnFirst off)
toggle.loadOnFirstTitle: If off, the skill's script-tools don't enter the chat: they stay usable only via an agent (hierarchical delegation).

compile.buttonTitle: The AI proposes a typed schema for this descriptive skill's scripts, turning them into fast, deterministic tools (instead of sandbox-only execution).
compile.reviewSubtitle: The AI proposed a schema for each script. Review the descriptions and input_schema, then confirm: the skill becomes typed and its scripts are exposed as tools.
compile.invalidJson: input_schema is not valid JSON for "{{file}}".
compile.suggestHint: This descriptive skill ran successfully at least 5 times via sandbox: compiling it to a typed tool will make it faster and deterministic.

actions.updateZipTitle: Upload a new ZIP to update the skill files (config values are preserved)
actions.syncTitle: Download the latest version from the marketplace (config values are preserved)
actions.reinstallTitle: Update metadata from SKILL.md frontmatter and reinstall dependencies (config values are preserved)

empty: No skills — upload a .zip package to start

script.llmVisible: Visible to the LLM agent — click to hide it
script.llmHidden: Hidden from the LLM agent — click to make it visible
script.notePlaceholder: E.g.: Available models: products_per_project (recommends physical components), categories_per_customer (functional categories). Use products_per_project for detailed recommendations.
script.noManualNote: No manual note — the LLM uses the info script output:
script.noNote: No note — the LLM will only see the static description. Run the info script to update it automatically.

info.availableWhenReady: Available when the skill is ready.

project.title: Projects
project.note: The SKILL.md is injected into the prompt of assigned projects.

marketplace.emptyHint: Contribute by publishing your skills on GitHub.

daemon.noDaemonSkills: No skill with a daemon script available.
daemon.intro: Background processes started by skills. They run autonomously and send real-time notifications when they detect events (new emails, updates, etc.).
daemon.emptyHint: Start a background process with "New daemon" to receive real-time notifications.

shared.info: These skills are installed by other users and made available to everyone. They're already active in the agent — no need to install them. The owner controls configuration, assignments and updates.
shared.emptyHint: When a user shares a skill and it's approved, it will appear here.
